subject: Meowth, the Normal-type cat Pokémon with a coin on its forehead, standing on a Mediterranean-style rooftop or ledge
description: A small, cream-colored cat Pokémon with a round coin-like medallion on its forehead stands on what appears to be a sunny rooftop or elevated ledge. White and tan buildings with a coastal or Mediterranean style are visible in the background under a bright blue sky. The Pokémon's pose is upright and alert, with a slightly smug or confident air. The setting conveys a warm, sunny urban environment.
foreground: cream cat Pokémon with forehead coin standing on ledge
background: white and tan coastal buildings under blue sky
